calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-30-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Geraldine Armendariz for and with Maria Quintana. Jason Pintar for beneficiary Alex Quintana. Milton Katz (counsel) in Propria Persona. Monica Meinardi (Interpreter for Ms. Quintana).

The Court did not receive the Trial Briefs on time. The Court allowed one hour for this hearing. If the matter requires more time, it will be continued to another day. Ms. Armendariz presented that a stipulation had been reached regarding the distribution, but she is still waiting for one signature. She also stated that the only remaining issues were the reimbursement of costs and fees to Mr. Katz. She just received his statement for costs yesterday at 4:00 PM. Counsel agreed to the amount of $2,719.50 for costs. She expressed that Mr. Katz failed to meet his obligation as an attorney to move the matter along in a timely manner and to make sure that his client clearly understood the issues regarding the inablility to purchase the property and that he should receive $1,000.00 for his services. Mr. Katz argued that he provided his services to Ms. Quintana. Mr. Pintar expressed that his client is frustrated in the delay of the closing of the estate. All parties presented closing arguements. The Court took the matter under submission. Ms. Armendariz requested to file an Ex-Parte petition for the Final Distribution, which the court allowed.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Bailiff: Juan Guitron. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-10-2007 Continued To Oct-05-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Geraldine Armendariz appearing for executor Maria Quintana. Jason Pintar appearing for objector. Ms. Armendariz requested for a half day hearing. The objections are to the lost of value of the house. Accounting issues are not resolved. Matter is continued to 10/5 at 9am. Trial briefs are due at least one week before hearing.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (355 Hale Street, San Francisco, Ca 94134)
Off Calendar May-11-2007 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Geraldine Armendariz appearing for petitioner. Jason Pintar appearing for beneficiary Alex Quintana. Mr. Pintar is objecting to the new appraisal of $750,000.00. He wanted to reserve the right to argue the correct value of the property. Court is allowing sale to go forward today and the beneficiary's right is reserve. Sale is confirmed at $700,000.00. N/B. Counsel will prepare an order.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: F. Smith.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (355 Hale Street, San Francisco, Ca 94134)
Off Calendar Apr-10-2007 Continued To May-08-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Geraldine Armendariz appearing for petitioner. Jason Pintar appearing for beneficiary Alex Quintana. Ms. Armendariz wants the Court to order the probate referee to reappraise the property and continue the hearing. Mr. Pintar is objecting to the listing price and the delay in selling the property. He is willing to have the sale go forward today but have the sale proceed held in blocked account pending further determination of amount of entitlement. Court can not order the probate referee to reappraise the property but counsel can ask for one. The buyer is not ready to re-submit the bid to 90% today. Matter is continued to 5/8.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR# 1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: F. Smith.
